meta.name: Jason Zhang
meta.title: Data Scientist & Analyst
meta.footer: Built with Tailwind CSS, Alpine.js & Lucide Icons. Hosted on GitHub Pages.

experience.description: Led a team of 5 to build a real-time churn-prediction engine that reduced customer attrition by 18%. Designed and deployed ML pipelines processing 2M+ events/day on AWS SageMaker.
Built NLP models for sentiment analysis across 50K+ daily social-media posts, driving a 25% improvement in campaign targeting for a Fortune 500 client.
Created interactive Tableau dashboards used by C-suite to monitor KPIs. Automated 12 weekly reports, saving ~20 hours/month of manual work.

education.detail: Thesis: "Graph Neural Networks for Fraud Detection in Financial Networks"
Minor in Computer Science · Summa Cum Laude

projects.title: Churn Predictor
projects.description: Real-time ML pipeline on AWS SageMaker that predicts at-risk subscribers and triggers automated retention campaigns.

projects.title: Sentiment Radar
projects.description: NLP engine analysing 50K+ social posts/day. Powers a live dashboard used by marketing teams to adjust spend in real time.

projects.title: Fraud Graph
projects.description: Graph Neural Network that maps transactional relationships to detect fraud rings, deployed as a microservice with sub-200ms latency.

projects.title: Supply Route Optimizer
projects.description: Combinatorial optimization model that re-routes a fleet of 300+ trucks nightly, saving $1.6M annually in fuel and labour.

projects.title: Medical Image Classifier
projects.description: CNN-based classifier that detects early-stage diabetic retinopathy from retinal fundus images, cutting radiologist review time by 40%.

projects.title: LLM Knowledge Base
projects.description: RAG-powered chatbot over internal documentation, enabling 500+ employees to self-serve answers with cited sources.

publications.title: Graph Neural Networks for Temporal Fraud Detection in Large-Scale Payment Networks
publications.tldr: Novel GNN architecture achieving SOTA on temporal fraud graphs with 3× faster inference.

publications.title: Practical Approaches to Distribution Shift in Production ML Pipelines
publications.tldr: A lightweight drift-detection framework validated across 12 production systems.

publications.title: From Jupyter to Production: Lessons from Deploying 7 Models at Scale
publications.tldr: War stories and patterns for bridging the notebook-to-production gap.

publications.title: Causal Inference for A/B Testing Under Network Interference
publications.tldr: Correcting treatment-effect estimates when users influence each other's outcomes.

publications.title: Building a Feature Store from Scratch on a Startup Budget
publications.tldr: How we replaced a $200K vendor with open-source tooling in 6 weeks.

methodology.label: Problem Framing
methodology.detail: Translate business questions into measurable hypotheses and success metrics before touching any data.

methodology.label: Data Exploration
methodology.detail: Profile, clean, and understand the data landscape — distributions, missingness, and biases.

methodology.label: Modeling & Experimentation
methodology.detail: Iterate fast with baselines first. Use experiment tracking (MLflow) and rigorous cross-validation.

methodology.label: Productionisation
methodology.detail: Containerise, CI/CD, and deploy behind feature flags. Every model ships with a rollback plan.

methodology.label: Monitoring & Feedback
methodology.detail: Track data drift, model degradation, and business KPIs. Close the loop with automated retraining triggers.
